notes: Governed EFSA source for microplastics evidence limits and method immaturity.
This record is intentionally isolated from pesticide-residue method support.

methods.display_name: WHO oral exposure review for nano- and microplastics
notes: Governed WHO review metadata for oral-exposure evidence on microplastics and nanoplastics.

emerging_contaminant.display_name: Microplastics and nanoplastics in food and dietary exposure
notes: This family is structurally separate from pesticide-residue workflows even though it is exposed through the same MCP governance surface.
Internal-review and consultation-oriented support are allowed, but submission-oriented use hard-fails by default until a reviewed official method pack changes the posture.
No PRIMo, DEEM, or OpenFoodTox method record is reused as if it were microplastics-native.
